title: Be the Top Dog on Hyperliquid $HYPE
summary_title: TopDog: multiplayer trading footprints and guild wars on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Telegram mini app for copying whale trades in real-time, launching guild battles next week with respect points.

key_moments.label: TopDog origin: copy trading tool that kept sinking their balance
Footprints feature: real-time whale trades on chart with 1-2 second latency
Multiplayer-first design: follow wallets, see PnLs, profiles in one app
Telegram mini app: zero onboarding friction, single-click access via existing login
Cashback rewards: 5-25% based on 30-day volume batches
Guild system launching next week with respect points and weekly battles
Trench mode coming for Hyper EVM: meme coin trading with same footprint visibility
Revenue model: 0.02% fee on top of Hyperliquid builder code

pull_quote: We figured out that blindly copy trading doesn't work, so we armed users with lean information just enough to make their own trade decisions.
